html_content:

html_content:
Order Received

Thanks {{first_name}}, we have received your Restwell order and our team is processing it.

name: appointment-confirmation
subject: Appointment Confirmation - {{appointment_date}}

subject: Ridgeline Reply Confirmation - Ref {{reference_id}}
